/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/test_udp_loopback.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/test_udp_loopback.dir/tests/test_udp_loopback.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_udp_loopback.dir/src/network/packet.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_udp_loopback.dir/src/network/udp_server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_udp_loopback.dir/src/rvc/pipeline.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_udp_loopback.dir/src/rvc/inferencer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_udp_loopback.dir/src/rvc/feature_extractor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_udp_loopback.dir/src/rvc/model_loader.cpp.o -o test_udp_loopback  /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libspdlog.so.1.12.0 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libfmt.so.9.1.0
